clarification: In the original replay summary, fallbackCount/fallbackReasons are narrative non-acceptance counts, not product-level deterministic fallback counts. Product-level fallback is tracked separately via productFallbackReason in per-case results.
recommendation: Use narrativeAcceptedCount/narrativeNonAcceptedCount for the ticket gate. Do not treat productUsedLocalModelWithoutAcceptedNarrative as accepted whatHappened narrative or as product-ready comprehension.
